Kick.DefaultScopes: events:subscribe channel:read channel:write user:read chat:write streamkey:read moderation:ban
Kick.// ClipsFetcher: URL+secret of the clips-fetcher sidecar. Aspire injects these per run; these defaults match docker/docker-compose.yml for the manual fallback. Prod sets them via deploy secrets.

Seed.// SuperAdminUsername: Kick handle (lowercase) granted SuperAdmin on first deploy. Override via env Seed__SuperAdminUsername. Once the seeded row's username differs from the placeholder ('superadmin'), this setting becomes a no-op.
